title: abutilon longicuspe
intro: Abutilon longicuspe is a plant species native to tropical regions, belonging to the family Malvaceae and commonly known as the 'Long-toothed Indian Mallow'. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Abutilon longicuspe include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal infusions, decoctions, and teas, which are used in folk medicine to address various ailments.
